content.en:
"This copy body will stay here, while cultivating and waiting, if the other copy bodies fall, copy the copy body here again. "

Ye Tian decided.

Subsequently.

His other copy body went to look for the three resources of Reincarnation Xuantian Copper, the Heavenly Spirit Flower on the Other Side, and the Void Mist Grass, and he didn't know where these three resources would be, so he could only look for them randomly, maybe one day he would find them if he was lucky.

There is no way to do this, after all, these three resources are too rare.

Moreover, it is very difficult to practice the Origin Ancestral Body Method on the other side of the advanced level, and if it is so easy to practice, it will be strange.

In the land of the Eternal Shore, there are too few Origin Upper Realm Overlords, and it is not easy to practice any kind of Origin Ancestral Body Method on the other side.

Ye Tian didn't expect that he could gather these resources in a short period of time, and then refine the body of reincarnation Haotian, he was also ready for a long time.

The years that followed.

Ye Tian was constantly looking for those three resources in the ruins of reincarnation, and occasionally encountered danger.

this day.

Ye Tian encountered a reincarnation ruin creature at the Origin Upper Realm overlord level - Reincarnation Kunpeng!

The speed of this reincarnation Kunpeng was too fast, it slashed past Ye Tian's side, and its wings directly penetrated Ye Tian's body, killing him in an instant.

In Ye Tian's opinion, the strength of this reincarnation Kunpeng was probably more powerful than that of ordinary Origin Upper Realm overlords.

However, compared to the terrifying King of the Abyss Beasts in the core area of the Middle Abyss, it was still much weaker.

The years passed, and tens of thousands of primeval eras passed unconsciously.

During this period, Ye Tian also fell many times.

But suddenly, he found a treasure place, which was also the lair of some kind of reincarnation ruin creature.

This reincarnation ruin creature is still a reincarnation blood worm, he came here, just by the way to copy a reincarnation blood worm copy body, by the way to sneak in to see the situation, as a result of finding the other side of the heavenly spirit flower in their nest, and not one, but a whole dozen.

However, these Heavenly Spirit Flowers on the other side also seemed to be useful to the Reincarnation Blood Worm, so they also protected them well.

With the strength of his reincarnation blood worm replicating body, if he forcibly captures it, he will definitely be pressed and rubbed.

Thereupon.

Ye Tian thought of a way, that is, to find out if there were other reincarnation ruin creatures nearby, and provoke each other, which was also the method he used to use before.

This method is shameless, but it works!

As long as he causes a big war between the two sides, he can fish in troubled waters and take the opportunity to take away these Heavenly Spirit Flowers on the other side.

Just do it when you think of it.

this day.

Ye Tian found another reincarnation ruin creature - the reincarnation golden eagle, this group is not many in number, but the individual strength is very strong.

Thereupon.

Ye Tian first attacked and killed a reincarnation golden eagle as a reincarnation blood worm replicating body, and then used the reincarnation golden eagle to copy the body to attack and kill a lot of reincarnation blood insects.

In this way, the two sides were constantly provoked by Ye Tian, and finally went to war.

Thundered!!!!!

The ruins of reincarnation are an area, and the two sides are constantly fighting.

At this time.

One of Ye Tian's reincarnation blood worm copied the body and came to the Heavenly Spirit Flower on the other side, took the opportunity to take all the Heavenly Spirit Flower on the other side, and then quickly escaped.

......

"That's it!"

Ye Tian was extremely excited.

In this way, he only had the two resources of Reincarnation Xuantian Copper and Void Mist Grass left, and once he found these two resources again, he could start cultivating the Reincarnation Haotian Body.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian sent the Heavenly Spirit Flower to the replica body in the ruins, so as to ensure that these Heavenly Spirit Flowers on the other side would not be lost, otherwise the other replica bodies would fall and there would be no treasures.

After sending it back, he continued to look for the other two resources.

Time flies.

Another day after tens of thousands of primeval years.

Ye Tian finally found the Xuantian Copper on the other side, he found it in a treasure land in the ruins of reincarnation, this treasure land is full of ore vein materials, and one of the ore vein materials is the Xuantian Copper on the other side.

Of course.

There are also many terrifying creatures in this treasure land, no less than the Overlord of the Origin Upper Realm, he copied the creatures of the ruins of reincarnation, so he mixed in, but he will also be killed by other ruins of reincarnation.

In short, he lost a lot of copy bodies before he snatched some Xuantian copper from the other side.

"Only the Void Mist Grass is left!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

He had thought that it would take a long time for the Void Mist Grass to be found, but by chance, he found information about the Void Mist Grass from the Lord of the Cold Stars.

He didn't come out of the ruins of reincarnation, but other replica bodies met the Lord of the Cold Star.

He wasn't afraid to reveal the doppelganger, and the Lord of the Cold Star didn't ask, thinking that he had come out of the ruins of reincarnation!

Of course.

It wasn't that he took the initiative to find the Lord of the Cold Star, but that the Lord of the Cold Star had failed to cultivate the Origin Ancestral Method on the other side again, and he lacked the cold gold on the other side, so he came to him for a deal.

He chatted with the Lord of the Cold Stars, saying that he needed the Void Mist Grass, which allowed the Lord of the Cold Stars to reveal the information.

"Lord of Endless, I know where there is Void Mist Grass, if you give me some cold gold from the other side, I will tell you!" said the Lord of the Cold Star.

"Okay, deal!"

Ye Tian agreed.

He directly took out some cold gold from the other side.

Last time, he looked for a lot of cold gold on the other side, and there was still a lot left, so this time he didn't need to continue looking for the cold gold on the other side.

Seeing that Ye Tian took out these cold gold, the Lord of the Cold Star was excited, and he didn't hide it anymore, and directly revealed: "Lord of Endless, there is only one place where the Void Mist Grass can be found, and that is in the dark Void Mist of the Ruins of Reincarnation. "

"Dark Void Mist?"

Ye Tian didn't know this.

But after the Lord of the Cold Stars, he finally knew where the Dark Void Mist was.

The black mist area of the core area of the Lord of the Void Treasure Land of the Ancient Heavenly Palace is the dark mist, the terrifying place where the Heavenly Ancestor of the Origin Upper Realm touches and dies.

The Lord of the Cold Star continued: "Lord of Endless, the Dark Void Mist is very terrifying, if we go in, we will definitely die, only the Origin Upper Realm Overlord who has cultivated the Origin Ancestral Body Method on the other side will dare to enter, and there is the Void Mist Grass in there, if you can ask an Origin Upper Realm Overlord to find the Void Grass, maybe there will be a chance." Of course, if you go to trade with some Origin Upper Realm Overlords, maybe one of them will have inventory!"

Looking for a Origin Upper Realm Overlord to trade?

He doesn't have the qualifications yet, and people won't trade it.

After all, this thing is too rare and very precious.

Thinking about it, the only way to enter the dark void and not die, if you find this way, maybe you can hope to enter there.
